title: MyTPA
body:
**MyTPa** is a handy plugin for **Minecraft** that adds a teleportation request system between players. It is ideal for servers where a balance between convenience and fair play is required.

The main features are:

1. Teleportation Requests: Players can send requests to other users with the command **/tpa [player].**
Request Management: Accept requests **/tpaac** or reject them **/tpac.**

2. Abuse Protection: Prohibit sending requests immediately after death or too frequent use.

3. This plugin will be a great addition to any server, adding a handy tool for interaction between players. 🎮

**Must work on all versions**
